svg.text: index.html • wikioracle.js (state, render, drag/menu) • tree.js (D3 hierarchy + DAG traversal)
state.js • config.js (sessionStorage) • util.js (settings, validators, escapeHtml) • query.js (fetch shim)
Layouts: horizontal / vertical • Themes: system / light / dark • CSP: enforced (no inline scripts)
TLS termination (Let's Encrypt) • ProxyPass /chat → 127.0.0.1:8888 • static asset cache
HTTP loopback :8888 • bin/wo CLI bypass for OpenClaw
bin/wikioracle.py — Flask shim (stateless: no disk writes)
3. Voting fan-out to beta providers (call-chain guard)
HTTP /chat/completions • per-provider key resolution • SSE streaming
Storage — XML, schema-validated (stateful mode; wikioracle.org runs stateless)
Cycle prevention: each vote carries the alpha call chain; provider stays silent if in ancestry.
state.truth → static_truth + dynamic_truth → provider → XHTML response
Anti-capture: EMA anchor pull, fresh AdamW per step, grad-clip ≤ grad_clip.
store_concrete = false (default): no worldline capture. detect_identifiability() filters PII regardless.
Feelings are session-only by design — never train weights, never enter the TruthSet.
Local Freedom under Global Constraint (LFGC): global truth + local interpretive freedom.
